hotspots.note: Highest cargo theft volume in Canada.
Second highest. Port and Saint-Laurent zones.

incidents.title: Electronics load
incidents.business: Secured carrier yard — Rutherford Rd & Steeles area
incidents.prevention: High-security padlocks on all parked trailers. Motion-activated lighting. CCTV with remote monitoring.

incidents.title: 47 trailers recovered in theft ring bust
incidents.business: Multiple industrial yards — Saint-Laurent and Anjou
incidents.method: Organized theft ring — coordinated yard hits
incidents.prevention: GPS tracking on all trailers. Geofence alerts when equipment leaves yard after hours.

incidents.title: Reefer load — meat products
incidents.method: Stolen while driver inside truck stop
incidents.prevention: Never leave loaded reefer unattended at unsecured stops. Use attended parking or secured yards only.

incidents.title: Consumer electronics — US-bound
incidents.method: Trailer stolen from yard with fictitious paperwork
incidents.prevention: Verify carrier credentials before releasing loads. Call references. Check insurance and authorities.

incidents.title: Identity theft pickup
incidents.prevention: Always verify MC number and insurance. Call the carrier directly using publicly listed number, not the one provided.

incidents.title: Building materials — two trailers
incidents.prevention: King pin locks on all trailers. Perimeter fencing inspections. Overnight security patrols.

incidents.title: Three reefers — food products
incidents.method: Weekend break-in — fence cut, trucks driven out
incidents.prevention: Weekend security patrols. Air brake valve locks. GPS on all power units and trailers.

incidents.title: Five trailers — mixed freight
incidents.prevention: Gladhand locks and king pin locks on all parked trailers. Report suspicious activity immediately.

source: Équité Association, Insurance Bureau of Canada, industry reports
